title: config.toml doc example uses mainnet endpoint (zec.rocks) with no network label
description: cli/src/config.rs line 27: the doc comment example shows 'lightwalletd = "https://zec.rocks:443"' but zec.rocks serves mainnet, while the code default (DEFAULT_TESTNET_ENDPOINT in wallet/src/client.rs) is lightwalletd.testnet.z.cash:443. A developer reading the config.toml example and copying it while running --network testnet (the default) would connect a testnet wallet to a mainnet lightwalletd endpoint. The connection succeeds (same gRPC protocol) but the block heights and transactions are for a different chain, so balance queries and confirmations silently produce wrong results. Fix: change the doc example to use the testnet endpoint to match the default network, and add a comment noting mainnet users should substitute the mainnet URL.
